reviews.comment:
Excelente atención. Lindo lugar para pasar una tarde dentro del predio del ACA. Respecto al resto, amplio, gran variedad, buena atención y rápida. Muy recomendable

(Translated by Google)
Excellent service. A lovely place to spend an afternoon on the ACA grounds. Compared to other restaurants, it's spacious, has a great selection, and is fast and friendly. Highly recommended.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/3043323831765025756/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNnZ09UdTB3RRAB
